title: Settings
accessRestrictedMsg: Only administrators can access system settings.

help.title: Settings
help.intro: Global configuration for the entire Arthur MCP Adapter server. Changes saved here apply to all projects and all users — only administrators can access this page.
help.sectionServer: Server — the public URL of this instance and the default HTTP timeout for upstream API calls.
help.sectionEmail: E-mail (SMTP) — credentials used to send password-reset emails.
help.saveReminder: Always click Save settings at the bottom after making changes. Navigating away without saving will discard your edits.

server.title: Server
server.urlHelper: Used to generate curl examples and password reset links.

headers.title: Global request headers
headers.helpBody: These headers are sent on every API call made by any server, regardless of the endpoint. Individual endpoints can add their own specific headers on top of these.
headers.empty: No global headers defined — click Add header to set one

smtp.title: E-mail (SMTP)
smtp.passwordAlreadySet: SMTP password already set — leave blank to keep it.

terminology.title: Terminology
terminology.helpBody: Override the default labels used throughout the interface. Leave a field blank to keep the default term.

saveValidationError: Please fix validation errors before saving.
